annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under W. Va. Code § 56-6-31(b) — 6.25% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from West Virginia’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at code.wvlegislature.gov. Not legal advice.
